global_tooltips.email: EBI requires an email address for remote jobs
global_tooltips.input_file: Protein sequence as FASTA (.fa/.fasta) or an AlphaFold PDB (.pdb). PDB input auto-extracts the sequence and pre-fills the pLDDT analysis.
global_tooltips.input_genomic: FASTA of genomic region containing gene (include at least 500bp up- and downstream)
global_tooltips.run_name: Short identifier used as the prefix for all output files
global_tooltips.working_dir: Directory for output. Autocompleted from Analysis name and editable

taxid.tooltip: UniProt taxonomic ID(s) to restrict the BLAST search (comma-separated list, e.g. 6239 for C. elegans). Leave blank to search all species.

taxid_file.tooltip: File containing one taxid per line — alternative to entering them manually

evalue.tooltip: E-value threshold: only BLAST hits better than this cutoff are kept

max_hits.tooltip: Maximum number of BLAST hits to retrieve (default 100)

db.tooltip: UniProt database to search: uniprotkb (all), swissprot (human-curated, smaller), trembl (computationally annotated, largest)

length.tooltip: Minimum hit length as a fraction of your query length — filters out partial matches (0 = no filter)

pdb.tooltip: Path to a local AlphaFold PDB file. Leave blank to search the AlphaFold Database automatically.

existing_AF2.tooltip: 1 = search AlphaFold DB for an existing prediction; 0 = use the PDB you supplied

evalue.tooltip: E-value cutoff for the BLAST search used to find the matching AlphaFold model

percent_id.tooltip: Minimum % sequence identity required to accept an AlphaFold model as a match

sites_file.tooltip: File of regex patterns defining PTM sites (phosphorylation, ubiquitination, etc.) — defaults to the bundled table

scores_file.tooltip: TSV file of per-amino-acid property scores (e.g., hydrophobicity) — defaults to the bundled Kyte-Doolittle table

window.tooltip: Sliding window size in residues for averaging the property score (1 = no smoothing)

genomic_fasta.tooltip: FASTA of the genomic region to search (orientation need not be known; run_genewise.py tests both strands automatically)

genewise.tooltip: path to a pre-computed Genewise .out.txt file (leave empty to run Genewise automatically via the EBI REST API)

n_guides.tooltip: maximum guide RNAs to report per insertion site

arm_length.tooltip: homology arm length in bp on each side of insertion

PAM.tooltip: IUPAC PAM sequence (e.g. NGG for SpCas9)

cut_offset.tooltip: bases upstream of PAM where the DSB occurs (SpCas9=3)

insert_sequence.tooltip: insert/tag DNA sequence — genotyping primers are always designed; setting this also adds 5'/3' junction primers spanning the tag boundaries

flank_min.tooltip: minimum distance (bp) of a genotyping primer from the insert site

flank_max.tooltip: maximum distance (bp) of a genotyping primer from the insert site
